patterns.authentication_pattern: Token auth in serve.rs lines 39-51: optional token check with direct string comparison
patterns.validation_pattern: Input validation pattern lines 54-82: early returns with StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST and JSON error
patterns.test_pattern: Unit tests in #[cfg(test)] mod tests using tokio::test macro and axum ServiceExt for testing

existing_implementations.description: serve.rs has basic token auth (timing-vulnerable), basic ID validation (incomplete), no body limits, no rate limiting, no security headers
security_gaps: Card ID validation only checks / and \ (lines 61-66), missing .., %, null bytes

dependencies_to_add.tower: 0.4 - for middleware (already in dev-dependencies, move to dependencies)
dependencies_to_add.tower-governor: 0.4 - for rate limiting OR custom HashMap-based rate limiter
